column1: I get up at seven every day.
column3: まいにちしちじにおきます。
column5: V-ます: polite present/future — standard polite affirmative; neutral register
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:polite-verb-endings source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column1: I will go to school tomorrow.
column3: あしたがっこうにいきます。
column5: V-ません: polite negative — polite refusal or statement of absence
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:polite-verb-endings source:authored frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column5: V-ました: polite past — completed action stated in polite register
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:polite-verb-endings source:authored frequency:top1k complexity:intro

column1: I read books at the library.
column2: 図書館で本を読みます。
column3: としょかんでほんをよみます。
column4: 図書館で本を読みます。
column5: V-ませんでした: polite past neg — did not do X; polite formal denial of past action
column7: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:polite-verb-endings source:authored frequency:top10k complexity:intro

column1: I go to the office by train.
column2: 電車で会社に行きます。
column3: でんしゃでかいしゃにいきます。
column4: 電車で会社に行きます。
column5: V-ましょう: polite volitional — shared intention or invitation; let's do X
